trigger_condition.note: Reallocation triggered at +100% return (upside) and at predetermined downside threshold (downside)

sizing_rule.note: Portfolio rebalancing/reallocation rule triggered at predetermined equity milestones rather than per-trade sizing. Upside trigger: +100% return example given. Downside trigger: threshold left to trader discretion. Specific allocation percentages and downside threshold values not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Rebalance and reallocate your portfolio at predetermined equity thresholds, such as when you achieve a 100% return on initial investment or at specified downside equity levels.
